_comment: Shared golden fixture for the ONE job-duration chain. Asserted by BOTH tests/sched.test.js (effectiveDuration) and backend/tests/test_duration_parity.py (_effective_duration) so live and batch can never drift. Chain: tech override > category time > tenant regular > 30. Neutral shape adapted in each test.

cases.why: category time when no tech override
regular default when category has no time
no catId falls to regular (ignores overrides/cats)
install example (60) honored via category everywhere
